[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 1001001 3
6 1101001 4
7 0010111 4

70 07 1001001 3 match 5
